summary: Iteration 12 — Partage Grille (share by link + email). Backend: 11/11 pytest pass (create, idempotency, foreign/invalid 404, public GET, invalid-token 404, auth required, email validation 400, email send returns 200 with sandbox recipient). Frontend: MyGrids loads cleanly (no ErrorBoundary — bug fix confirmed), share/delete buttons present, share dialog opens with grid preview + link input + email inputs, copy button works logically, send disabled with empty email, public /share/{token} page renders correctly (numbers, chance, strategy label, sharer name, CTA), invalid token shows 'Lien invalide' error card.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py now ~1627 lines — refactor into modules (share/, grids/, auth/, alerts/, wheel/) recommended before it grows further.

POST /grids/share: returned 'created_at' on the idempotent branch uses the existing share's created_at (good), but on the NEW branch it recomputes datetime.now() twice — one inserted, one returned. Both are ~equal so cosmetic only.

POST /grids/share-email: on Resend failure returns 500 with raw exception in detail. Consider mapping Resend sandbox errors (403 domain-not-verified) to 400/422 with a user-friendly message so the frontend toast is clearer.

SharedGrid.jsx: public page has no rate limiting on GET /share/{token}. Consider adding a lightweight rate limit at the endpoint since it is fully public and enumerable (12-hex tokens = ~2.8e14 space, safe from brute force but still worth throttling).
MyGrids.jsx: share dialog has no visual indication that the link is generated asynchronously — if /grids/share is slow, the readOnly input is briefly empty. Add a spinner or skeleton on shareLink.
test_credentials: Ephemeral mongosh-injected sessions used (iter12_* users cleaned up after tests). Existing labouyrie28 account untouched.
seed_data_creation: Ephemeral users iter12_ui_* and iter12_* + one saved grid each, plus one grid_shares row per share. All cleaned up in fixtures / final mongo delete.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Share endpoints stable. Public GET /api/share/{token} is intentionally unauthenticated. Resend still runs in sandbox — only labouyrie28@gmail.com can actually receive share emails until sender domain is verified. Frontend uses cookie-based session, no localStorage token — for UI testing, inject session_token cookie on the preview host with secure=True, sameSite=None.
rca of the issue: Previous ErrorBoundary loop caused by missing useState declarations for shareOpen/shareGrid/etc. is fixed in MyGrids.jsx lines 30-36 — all six state hooks are declared. Verified live: /dashboard/grids renders without any ReferenceError and without 'Une erreur est survenue' screen.
